subcodes.first_line: O 'Ali-Qabli-Akbar! The Prisoner calleth thee from the Most Great Horizon, and summoneth thee unto God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قبل اکبر ان المسجون ینادیک من المنظر الاکبر و یدعوک الی الله مالک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation
